decisions.decision: Use real-time API event streaming (not batch file transfer) as the primary integration pattern between the core ledger and the reconciliation engine.
decisions.rationale: Batch processing cannot achieve the ≤2-day cycle time target in OBJ-001. Real-time streaming is the only architecture that makes the KPI achievable.
decisions.alternatives_considered: Batch CSV export (current state) — rejected due to cycle time constraint. Message queue polling — considered but deprioritised due to latency concerns at peak volume.

decisions.decision: Adopt a phased delivery approach: Phase 1 MVP by Q3 2026 covering all must-have BRs; Phase 2 enhanced reporting in Q4 2026.
decisions.rationale: Regulatory deadline of 30 September 2026 is non-negotiable (CON-003). Phased delivery de-risks delivery of the compliance-critical features while keeping advanced analytics achievable.
decisions.alternatives_considered: Single big-bang delivery — rejected due to timeline risk. Skip enhanced reporting entirely — rejected because management reporting is a stakeholder priority for STK-001.
